text:
was an officially-licensed mobile game created by Finger Game, based on the Rebuild of Evangelion film series. The player collects several Evangelions and pilots to play battles from the first three films: Evangelion: 1.0 You Are (Not) Alone, Evangelion: 2.0 You Can (Not) Advance and Evangelion: 3.0 You Can (Not) Redo.

Overview

The gameplay primarily involved developing pilots, upgrading EVA units, and forming teams for automated battles. Other features included:
Login sign-in gift, daily tasks
Raising pilots: There are levels and talents that could be upgraded
EVA units: they had levels and skills that could be upgraded
Body painting system: the body's weapons can be upgraded
Level advancement: It depends on how far the team's combat power can reach
Interactive social system: Clan and the Arena. https://wsmwason.com/blog/post/596?
